headline: Wall Street Brunch: Payrolls Hit A Day Early
summary: June's employment numbers hit Thursday. Nike earnings: cheap stock or still a Sell? Middle East tensions rise as hostilities around Iran escalate again.

headline: A Newsletter Touted Comcast Corp. (CMCSA) As A SpaceX IPO Beneficiary
summary: Comcast Corp. (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is one of the Top 13 Stocks That Will Skyrocket. Mark Skousen’s Skousen Report discussed this stock as part of a play ahead of the SpaceX IPO.
